summary: Implemented tier filters for US-012. Created filterByTier pure function in src/domain/filterCards.ts that filters cards by a Set<Tier> (empty set returns all cards). Created TierFilter UI component with three toggle buttons (Open, Working, Deep) using aria-pressed for accessibility, color indicators plus text labels, and a conditional Clear filters button. Integrated tier filter state into BrowseAllCards with useState<Set<Tier>>, toggle/clear handlers, and filtered card rendering with updated count. All 200 unit tests pass, all 37 e2e tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
